judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent queried the correct collections and citations but, in execute_python, implemented contribution detection as a naive substring check for "empirical" and extracted the year via a heuristic that can select an earlier or copyright year, leading to filtering out valid papers and producing an empty result despite relevant records existing.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing execute_python step (call_CPnx0eBxK9SGIBcYgfG0LZzk), the agent incorrectly extracted publication years by taking the minimum year mentioned anywhere in the paper text (often a reference year), then filtered for year > 2016, which excluded all valid papers and produced an empty result despite using the correct databases and join.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After aggregating citations and loading all paper documents, the agent’s execute_python step classified “empirical” contributions by requiring the literal word “empirical” in the full text, which caused the (empirical AND year > 2016) filter to eliminate all records and produce an empty result despite many qualifying papers.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
